classes.description: Recent review and decision artifacts still inside the active time window.
Historical review artifacts that remain canonical evidence for governance, release, whitepaper, closure, or decision chains.
Historical review artifacts not pinned by live evidence chains and safe for archive migration.

summary.derivationMethod: Public-safe curation registry for the public repository. Private retain-evidence review paths are not exported; the only retained historical review path is the public active-window conformance trace stub required by the public guard chain.
